Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {75664} - \frac{2174^2}{66}\)  \(SS_{total} = {75664} - \frac{4726276}{66}\)  \(SS_{total} = {75664} - {71610.24}\)  \(SS_{total} = {4053.76}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {337.64 + 882.18 + 570.55 + 422.91 + 588.91 + 424.18}\)  \(SS_{within} = {3226.37}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {4053.76} - {3226.37}\)  \(SS_{between} = {827.39}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\) 
Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_A\) Summary Data for Factor_A  \(T_{A_1} = {1003}  \quad n_{A_1} = {33}\)  \(T_{A_2} = {1171}  \quad n_{A_2} = {33}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_A\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.0}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_A\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_A}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{1003}^2}{33} + \frac{{1171}^2}{33}} - \frac{{2174}^2}{66}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{1006009}}{33} + \frac{{1371241}}{33}} - \frac{{4726276}}{66}\) \(SS_{Factor_A} = {{30485.12} + {41552.76}} - {71610.24}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {72037.88} - {71610.24}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {427.64}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_A}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{427.64}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = {427.64}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{427.64}{53.77}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {7.95}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{427.64}{{4053.76} - {302.04} - {97.71}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{427.64}{3654.01}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.12}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({1}, {60}) = {7.95}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.12}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {703}  \quad n_{B_1} = {22}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {790}  \quad n_{B_2} = {22}\)  \(T_{B_3} = {681}  \quad n_{B_3} = {22}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.15}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{703}^2}{22} + \frac{{790}^2}{22} + \frac{{681}^2}{22}} - \frac{{2174}^2}{66}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{494209}}{22} + \frac{{624100}}{22} + \frac{{463761}}{22}} - \frac{{4726276}}{66}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{22464.05} + {28368.18} + {21080.05}} - {71610.24}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {71912.28} - {71610.24}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {302.04}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{302.04}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {151.02}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{151.02}{53.77}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {2.81}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{302.04}{{4053.76} - {427.64} - {97.71}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{302.04}{3528.41}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.09}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {60}) = {2.81}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.09}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {5} - {1} - {2}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {2}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.15}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {827.39} - {427.64} - {302.04}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {97.71}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{97.71}{2}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {48.86}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{48.86}{53.77}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {0.91}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{97.71}{{4053.76} - {427.64} - {302.04}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{97.71}{3324.08}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.03}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {60}) = {0.91}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.03}\)

title: Two-Factor ANOVA
text:
Problem 9
Given the following data, use a use a 2-Factor ANOVA with \(\alpha = {0.05}\) to analyze the following data  Full Group Summary Data  \(T_{A1B1} = {633} \quad M_{A1B1} = {45.21}\quad SS_{A1B1} = {1296.36} \quad n_{A1B1} = {14}\)  \(T_{A1B2} = {552} \quad M_{A1B2} = {39.43}\quad SS_{A1B2} = {1745.43} \quad n_{A1B2} = {14}\)  \(T_{A2B1} = {451} \quad M_{A2B1} = {32.21}\quad SS_{A2B1} = {1946.36} \quad n_{A2B1} = {14}\)  \(T_{A2B2} = {382} \quad M_{A2B2} = {27.29}\quad SS_{A2B2} = {940.86} \quad n_{A2B2} = {14}\)   Stage 1 ANOVA Calculations  Calculate the Degrees of Freedom: \(df_{total}, df_{within}, \text{ and } df_{between}\)  \(df_{total} = N - 1\)  \(df_{total} = {56} - 1\)  \(df_{total} = {55}\)  \(df_{between} = k - 1\)  \(df_{between} = {4} - 1\)  \(df_{between} = {3}\)  \(df_{within} = N - K\)  \(df_{within} = {56} - {4}\)  \(df_{within} = {52}\) 
Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {81266} - \frac{2018^2}{56}\)  \(SS_{total} = {81266} - \frac{4072324}{56}\)  \(SS_{total} = {81266} - {72720.07}\)  \(SS_{total} = {8545.93}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {1296.36 + 1745.43 + 1946.36 + 940.86}\)  \(SS_{within} = {5929.01}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {8545.93} - {5929.01}\)  \(SS_{between} = {2616.92}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\) 
Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_A\) Summary Data for Factor_A  \(T_{A_1} = {1185}  \quad n_{A_1} = {28}\)  \(T_{A_2} = {833}  \quad n_{A_2} = {28}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_A\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.03}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_A\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_A}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{1185}^2}{28} + \frac{{833}^2}{28}} - \frac{{2018}^2}{56}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{1404225}}{28} + \frac{{693889}}{28}} - \frac{{4072324}}{56}\) \(SS_{Factor_A} = {{50150.89} + {24781.75}} - {72720.07}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {74932.64} - {72720.07}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {2212.57}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_A}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{2212.57}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = {2212.57}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{2212.57}{114.02}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {19.41}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{2212.57}{{8545.93} - {401.79} - {2.56}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{2212.57}{8141.58}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.27}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({1}, {52}) = {19.41}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.27}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {1084}  \quad n_{B_1} = {28}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {934}  \quad n_{B_2} = {28}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.03}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{1084}^2}{28} + \frac{{934}^2}{28}} - \frac{{2018}^2}{56}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{1175056}}{28} + \frac{{872356}}{28}} - \frac{{4072324}}{56}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{41966.29} + {31155.57}} - {72720.07}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {73121.86} - {72720.07}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {401.79}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{401.79}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {401.79}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{401.79}{114.02}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {3.52}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{401.79}{{8545.93} - {2212.57} - {2.56}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{401.79}{6330.8}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.06}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {52}) = {3.52}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.06}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {3} - {1} - {1}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {1}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.03}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {2616.92} - {2212.57} - {401.79}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {2.56}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{2.56}{1}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {2.56}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{2.56}{114.02}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {0.02}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{2.56}{{8545.93} - {2212.57} - {401.79}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{2.56}{5931.57}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.0}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {52}) = {0.02}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.0}\)

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {308954} - \frac{4676^2}{72}\)  \(SS_{total} = {308954} - \frac{21864976}{72}\)  \(SS_{total} = {308954} - {303680.22}\)  \(SS_{total} = {5273.78}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {200.92 + 228.92 + 270.92 + 221.0 + 414.0 + 244.25}\)  \(SS_{within} = {1580.01}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {5273.78} - {1580.01}\)  \(SS_{between} = {3693.77}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\) 
Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_A\) Summary Data for Factor_A  \(T_{A_1} = {1510}  \quad n_{A_1} = {24}\)  \(T_{A_2} = {1525}  \quad n_{A_2} = {24}\)  \(T_{A_3} = {1641}  \quad n_{A_3} = {24}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_A\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.14}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_A\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_A}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{1510}^2}{24} + \frac{{1525}^2}{24} + \frac{{1641}^2}{24}} - \frac{{4676}^2}{72}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{2280100}}{24} + \frac{{2325625}}{24} + \frac{{2692881}}{24}} - \frac{{21864976}}{72}\) \(SS_{Factor_A} = {{95004.17} + {96901.04} + {112203.38}} - {303680.22}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {304108.59} - {303680.22}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {428.37}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_A}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{428.37}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = {214.18}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{214.18}{23.94}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {8.95}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{428.37}{{5273.78} - {186.89} - {3078.51}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{428.37}{2008.38}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.21}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {66}) = {8.95}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.21}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {2280}  \quad n_{B_1} = {36}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {2396}  \quad n_{B_2} = {36}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.99}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{2280}^2}{36} + \frac{{2396}^2}{36}} - \frac{{4676}^2}{72}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{5198400}}{36} + \frac{{5740816}}{36}} - \frac{{21864976}}{72}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{144400.0} + {159467.11}} - {303680.22}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {303867.11} - {303680.22}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {186.89}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{186.89}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {186.89}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{186.89}{23.94}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {7.81}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{186.89}{{5273.78} - {428.37} - {3078.51}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{186.89}{1766.9}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.11}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({1}, {66}) = {7.81}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.11}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {5} - {2} - {1}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {2}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.14}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {3693.77} - {428.37} - {186.89}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {3078.51}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{3078.51}{2}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {1539.26}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{1539.26}{23.94}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {64.3}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{3078.51}{{5273.78} - {428.37} - {186.89}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{3078.51}{4658.52}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.66}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {66}) = {64.3}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.66}\)

title: Two-Factor ANOVA
text:
Problem 11
Given the following data, use a use a 2-Factor ANOVA with \(\alpha = {0.01}\) to analyze the following data  Full Group Summary Data  \(T_{A1B1} = {288} \quad M_{A1B1} = {57.6}\quad SS_{A1B1} = {893.2} \quad n_{A1B1} = {5}\)  \(T_{A1B2} = {269} \quad M_{A1B2} = {53.8}\quad SS_{A1B2} = {462.8} \quad n_{A1B2} = {5}\)  \(T_{A2B1} = {293} \quad M_{A2B1} = {58.6}\quad SS_{A2B1} = {659.2} \quad n_{A2B1} = {5}\)  \(T_{A2B2} = {338} \quad M_{A2B2} = {67.6}\quad SS_{A2B2} = {561.2} \quad n_{A2B2} = {5}\)  \(T_{A3B1} = {300} \quad M_{A3B1} = {60.0}\quad SS_{A3B1} = {776.0} \quad n_{A3B1} = {5}\)  \(T_{A3B2} = {231} \quad M_{A3B2} = {46.2}\quad SS_{A3B2} = {466.8} \quad n_{A3B2} = {5}\)   Stage 1 ANOVA Calculations  Calculate the Degrees of Freedom: \(df_{total}, df_{within}, \text{ and } df_{between}\)  \(df_{total} = N - 1\)  \(df_{total} = {30} - 1\)  \(df_{total} = {29}\)  \(df_{between} = k - 1\)  \(df_{between} = {6} - 1\)  \(df_{between} = {5}\)  \(df_{within} = N - K\)  \(df_{within} = {30} - {6}\)  \(df_{within} = {24}\) 
Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {103571} - \frac{1719^2}{30}\)  \(SS_{total} = {103571} - \frac{2954961}{30}\)  \(SS_{total} = {103571} - {98498.7}\)  \(SS_{total} = {5072.3}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {893.2 + 462.8 + 659.2 + 561.2 + 776.0 + 466.8}\)  \(SS_{within} = {3819.2}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {5072.3} - {3819.2}\)  \(SS_{between} = {1253.1}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\) 
Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_A\) Summary Data for Factor_A  \(T_{A_1} = {557}  \quad n_{A_1} = {10}\)  \(T_{A_2} = {631}  \quad n_{A_2} = {10}\)  \(T_{A_3} = {531}  \quad n_{A_3} = {10}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_A\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {5.61}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_A\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_A}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{557}^2}{10} + \frac{{631}^2}{10} + \frac{{531}^2}{10}} - \frac{{1719}^2}{30}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{310249}}{10} + \frac{{398161}}{10} + \frac{{281961}}{10}} - \frac{{2954961}}{30}\) \(SS_{Factor_A} = {{31024.9} + {39816.1} + {28196.1}} - {98498.7}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {99037.1} - {98498.7}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {538.4}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_A}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{538.4}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = {269.2}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{269.2}{159.13}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {1.69}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{538.4}{{5072.3} - {61.64} - {653.06}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{538.4}{4357.6}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.12}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {24}) = {1.69}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.12}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {881}  \quad n_{B_1} = {15}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {838}  \quad n_{B_2} = {15}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {7.82}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{881}^2}{15} + \frac{{838}^2}{15}} - \frac{{1719}^2}{30}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{776161}}{15} + \frac{{702244}}{15}} - \frac{{2954961}}{30}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{51744.07} + {46816.27}} - {98498.7}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {98560.34} - {98498.7}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {61.64}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{61.64}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {61.64}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{61.64}{159.13}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {0.39}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{61.64}{{5072.3} - {538.4} - {653.06}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{61.64}{3880.84}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.02}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {24}) = {0.39}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.02}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {5} - {2} - {1}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {2}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {5.61}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {1253.1} - {538.4} - {61.64}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {653.06}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{653.06}{2}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {326.53}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{326.53}{159.13}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {2.05}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{653.06}{{5072.3} - {538.4} - {61.64}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{653.06}{4472.26}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.15}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {24}) = {2.05}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.15}\)

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {23251} - \frac{1199^2}{66}\)  \(SS_{total} = {23251} - \frac{1437601}{66}\)  \(SS_{total} = {23251} - {21781.83}\)  \(SS_{total} = {1469.17}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {73.64 + 125.64 + 292.18 + 136.18 + 92.18 + 116.73}\)  \(SS_{within} = {836.55}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {1469.17} - {836.55}\)  \(SS_{between} = {632.62}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\) 
Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_A\) Summary Data for Factor_A  \(T_{A_1} = {582}  \quad n_{A_1} = {33}\)  \(T_{A_2} = {617}  \quad n_{A_2} = {33}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_A\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {7.08}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_A\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_A}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{582}^2}{33} + \frac{{617}^2}{33}} - \frac{{1199}^2}{66}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{338724}}{33} + \frac{{380689}}{33}} - \frac{{1437601}}{66}\) \(SS_{Factor_A} = {{10264.36} + {11536.03}} - {21781.83}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {21800.39} - {21781.83}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {18.56}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_A}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{18.56}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = {18.56}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{18.56}{13.94}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {1.33}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{18.56}{{1469.17} - {325.95} - {288.11}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{18.56}{855.11}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.02}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {60}) = {1.33}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.02}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {441}  \quad n_{B_1} = {22}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {331}  \quad n_{B_2} = {22}\)  \(T_{B_3} = {427}  \quad n_{B_3} = {22}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.98}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{441}^2}{22} + \frac{{331}^2}{22} + \frac{{427}^2}{22}} - \frac{{1199}^2}{66}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{194481}}{22} + \frac{{109561}}{22} + \frac{{182329}}{22}} - \frac{{1437601}}{66}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{8840.05} + {4980.05} + {8287.68}} - {21781.83}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {22107.78} - {21781.83}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {325.95}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{325.95}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {162.98}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{162.98}{13.94}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {11.69}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{325.95}{{1469.17} - {18.56} - {288.11}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{325.95}{1162.5}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.28}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {60}) = {11.69}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.28}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {5} - {1} - {2}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {2}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{169.55}{10.18}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {16.66}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{38.33}{10.18}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {3.77}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{76.65}{{1323.04} - {169.55} - {343.61}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{76.65}{809.88}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.09}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {72}) = {3.77}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.09}\)

 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{0.84}{{302.98} - {0.14} - {244.01}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{0.84}{58.83}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.01}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {56}) = {0.81}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.01}\)

 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.11}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {2101.56} - {774.4} - {1013.75}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {313.41}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{313.41}{2}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {156.71}\)

 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{313.41}{{4528.22} - {774.4} - {1013.75}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{313.41}{2740.07}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.11}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {84}) = {5.42}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.11}\)

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {53123} - \frac{1287^2}{32}\)  \(SS_{total} = {53123} - \frac{1656369}{32}\)  \(SS_{total} = {53123} - {51761.53}\)  \(SS_{total} = {1361.47}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {262.0 + 178.88 + 605.5 + 76.0}\)  \(SS_{within} = {1122.38}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {1361.47} - {1122.38}\)  \(SS_{between} = {239.09}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{11.28}{40.08}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {0.28}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{11.28}{{1361.47} - {22.78} - {205.03}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{11.28}{1133.66}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.01}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {28}) = {0.28}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.01}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {630}  \quad n_{B_1} = {16}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {657}  \quad n_{B_2} = {16}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.2}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{630}^2}{16} + \frac{{657}^2}{16}} - \frac{{1287}^2}{32}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{396900}}{16} + \frac{{431649}}{16}} - \frac{{1656369}}{32}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{24806.25} + {26978.06}} - {51761.53}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {51784.31} - {51761.53}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {22.78}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{22.78}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {22.78}\)

 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{22.78}{{1361.47} - {11.28} - {205.03}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{22.78}{1145.16}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.02}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {28}) = {0.57}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.02}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {3} - {1} - {1}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {1}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.2}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {239.09} - {11.28} - {22.78}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {205.03}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{205.03}{1}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {205.03}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{205.03}{40.08}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {5.12}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{205.03}{{1361.47} - {11.28} - {22.78}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{205.03}{1327.41}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.15}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({1}, {28}) = {5.12}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.15}\)

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {12873} - \frac{1051^2}{90}\)  \(SS_{total} = {12873} - \frac{1104601}{90}\)  \(SS_{total} = {12873} - {12273.34}\)  \(SS_{total} = {599.66}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {45.73 + 103.73 + 74.93 + 128.4 + 91.73 + 49.73}\)  \(SS_{within} = {494.25}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {599.66} - {494.25}\)  \(SS_{between} = {105.41}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\) 
Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_A\) Summary Data for Factor_A  \(T_{A_1} = {493}  \quad n_{A_1} = {45}\)  \(T_{A_2} = {558}  \quad n_{A_2} = {45}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_A\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {6.95}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_A\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_A}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{493}^2}{45} + \frac{{558}^2}{45}} - \frac{{1051}^2}{90}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{243049}}{45} + \frac{{311364}}{45}} - \frac{{1104601}}{90}\) \(SS_{Factor_A} = {{5401.09} + {6919.2}} - {12273.34}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {12320.29} - {12273.34}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {46.95}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_A}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{46.95}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = {46.95}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{46.95}{5.88}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {7.98}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{46.95}{{599.66} - {42.15} - {16.31}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{46.95}{541.2}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.09}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({1}, {84}) = {7.98}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.09}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {379}  \quad n_{B_1} = {30}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {340}  \quad n_{B_2} = {30}\)  \(T_{B_3} = {332}  \quad n_{B_3} = {30}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.87}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{379}^2}{30} + \frac{{340}^2}{30} + \frac{{332}^2}{30}} - \frac{{1051}^2}{90}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{143641}}{30} + \frac{{115600}}{30} + \frac{{110224}}{30}} - \frac{{1104601}}{90}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{4788.03} + {3853.33} + {3674.13}} - {12273.34}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {12315.49} - {12273.34}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {42.15}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{42.15}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {21.08}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{21.08}{5.88}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {3.59}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{42.15}{{599.66} - {46.95} - {16.31}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{42.15}{536.4}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.08}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {84}) = {3.59}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.08}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {5} - {1} - {2}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {2}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.87}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {105.41} - {46.95} - {42.15}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {16.31}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{16.31}{2}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {8.15}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{8.15}{5.88}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {1.39}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{16.31}{{599.66} - {46.95} - {42.15}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{16.31}{510.56}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.03}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {84}) = {1.39}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.03}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{186.05}{4.45}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {41.81}\)

 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{136.3}{{1616.99} - {565.17} - {18.02}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{136.3}{1033.8}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.13}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({1}, {78}) = {11.84}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.13}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {5} - {2} - {1}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {2}\)

 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {5.39}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {643.93} - {306.25} - {39.49}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {298.19}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{298.19}{2}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {149.1}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{15.43}{37.29}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {0.41}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{159.1}{37.29}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {4.27}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{318.2}{{4072.1} - {30.86} - {702.94}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{318.2}{3338.3}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.1}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {81}) = {4.27}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.1}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {8} - {2} - {2}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {4}\)

 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{702.94}{{4072.1} - {30.86} - {318.2}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{702.94}{3723.04}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.19}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({4}, {81}) = {4.71}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.19}\)

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {7104} - \frac{374^2}{20}\)  \(SS_{total} = {7104} - \frac{139876}{20}\)  \(SS_{total} = {7104} - {6993.8}\)  \(SS_{total} = {110.2}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {11.2 + 42.0 + 9.2 + 22.0}\)  \(SS_{within} = {84.4}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {110.2} - {84.4}\)  \(SS_{between} = {25.8}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\) 
Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_A\) Summary Data for Factor_A  \(T_{A_1} = {197}  \quad n_{A_1} = {10}\)  \(T_{A_2} = {177}  \quad n_{A_2} = {10}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_A\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.49}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_A\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_A}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{197}^2}{10} + \frac{{177}^2}{10}} - \frac{{374}^2}{20}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{38809}}{10} + \frac{{31329}}{10}} - \frac{{139876}}{20}\) \(SS_{Factor_A} = {{3880.9} + {3132.9}} - {6993.8}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {7013.8} - {6993.8}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {20.0}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_A}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{20.0}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = {20.0}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{20.0}{5.28}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {3.79}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{20.0}{{110.2} - {0.8} - {5.0}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{20.0}{104.4}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.19}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {16}) = {3.79}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.19}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {189}  \quad n_{B_1} = {10}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {185}  \quad n_{B_2} = {10}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.49}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{189}^2}{10} + \frac{{185}^2}{10}} - \frac{{374}^2}{20}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{35721}}{10} + \frac{{34225}}{10}} - \frac{{139876}}{20}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{3572.1} + {3422.5}} - {6993.8}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {6994.6} - {6993.8}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {0.8}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{0.8}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {0.8}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{0.8}{5.28}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {0.15}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{0.8}{{110.2} - {20.0} - {5.0}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{0.8}{85.2}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.01}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {16}) = {0.15}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.01}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {3} - {1} - {1}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {1}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.49}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {25.8} - {20.0} - {0.8}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {5.0}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{5.0}{1}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {5.0}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{5.0}{5.28}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {0.95}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{5.0}{{110.2} - {20.0} - {0.8}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{5.0}{89.4}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.06}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {16}) = {0.95}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.06}\)

title: Two-Factor ANOVA
text:
Problem 30
Given the following data, use a use a 2-Factor ANOVA with \(\alpha = {0.05}\) to analyze the following data  Full Group Summary Data  \(T_{A1B1} = {302} \quad M_{A1B1} = {37.75}\quad SS_{A1B1} = {519.5} \quad n_{A1B1} = {8}\)  \(T_{A1B2} = {341} \quad M_{A1B2} = {42.62}\quad SS_{A1B2} = {203.88} \quad n_{A1B2} = {8}\)  \(T_{A1B3} = {445} \quad M_{A1B3} = {55.62}\quad SS_{A1B3} = {319.88} \quad n_{A1B3} = {8}\)  \(T_{A2B1} = {366} \quad M_{A2B1} = {45.75}\quad SS_{A2B1} = {239.5} \quad n_{A2B1} = {8}\)  \(T_{A2B2} = {352} \quad M_{A2B2} = {44.0}\quad SS_{A2B2} = {216.0} \quad n_{A2B2} = {8}\)  \(T_{A2B3} = {349} \quad M_{A2B3} = {43.62}\quad SS_{A2B3} = {113.88} \quad n_{A2B3} = {8}\)  \(T_{A3B1} = {449} \quad M_{A3B1} = {56.12}\quad SS_{A3B1} = {168.88} \quad n_{A3B1} = {8}\)  \(T_{A3B2} = {398} \quad M_{A3B2} = {49.75}\quad SS_{A3B2} = {257.5} \quad n_{A3B2} = {8}\)  \(T_{A3B3} = {265} \quad M_{A3B3} = {33.12}\quad SS_{A3B3} = {264.88} \quad n_{A3B3} = {8}\)   Stage 1 ANOVA Calculations  Calculate the Degrees of Freedom: \(df_{total}, df_{within}, \text{ and } df_{between}\)  \(df_{total} = N - 1\)  \(df_{total} = {72} - 1\)  \(df_{total} = {71}\)  \(df_{between} = k - 1\)  \(df_{between} = {9} - 1\)  \(df_{between} = {8}\)  \(df_{within} = N - K\)  \(df_{within} = {72} - {9}\)  \(df_{within} = {63}\) 
Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {154229} - \frac{3267^2}{72}\)  \(SS_{total} = {154229} - \frac{10673289}{72}\)  \(SS_{total} = {154229} - {148240.12}\)  \(SS_{total} = {5988.88}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {519.5 + 203.88 + 319.88 + 239.5 + 216.0 + 113.88 + 168.88 + 257.5 + 264.88}\)  \(SS_{within} = {2303.9}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {5988.88} - {2303.9}\)  \(SS_{between} = {3684.98}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\) 
Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_A\) Summary Data for Factor_A  \(T_{A_1} = {1088}  \quad n_{A_1} = {24}\)  \(T_{A_2} = {1067}  \quad n_{A_2} = {24}\)  \(T_{A_3} = {1112}  \quad n_{A_3} = {24}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_A\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.14}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_A\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_A}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{1088}^2}{24} + \frac{{1067}^2}{24} + \frac{{1112}^2}{24}} - \frac{{3267}^2}{72}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{1183744}}{24} + \frac{{1138489}}{24} + \frac{{1236544}}{24}} - \frac{{10673289}}{72}\) \(SS_{Factor_A} = {{49322.67} + {47437.04} + {51522.67}} - {148240.12}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {148282.38} - {148240.12}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {42.26}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_A}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{42.26}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = {21.13}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{21.13}{36.57}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {0.58}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{42.26}{{5988.88} - {70.34} - {3572.38}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{42.26}{2346.16}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.02}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {63}) = {0.58}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.02}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {1117}  \quad n_{B_1} = {24}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {1091}  \quad n_{B_2} = {24}\)  \(T_{B_3} = {1059}  \quad n_{B_3} = {24}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.14}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{1117}^2}{24} + \frac{{1091}^2}{24} + \frac{{1059}^2}{24}} - \frac{{3267}^2}{72}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{1247689}}{24} + \frac{{1190281}}{24} + \frac{{1121481}}{24}} - \frac{{10673289}}{72}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{51987.04} + {49595.04} + {46728.38}} - {148240.12}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {148310.46} - {148240.12}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {70.34}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{70.34}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {35.17}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{35.17}{36.57}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {0.96}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{70.34}{{5988.88} - {42.26} - {3572.38}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{70.34}{2374.24}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.03}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {63}) = {0.96}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.03}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {8} - {2} - {2}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {4}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {2.52}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {3684.98} - {42.26} - {70.34}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {3572.38}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{3572.38}{4}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {893.1}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{893.1}{36.57}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {24.42}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{3572.38}{{5988.88} - {42.26} - {70.34}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{3572.38}{5876.28}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.61}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({4}, {63}) = {24.42}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.61}\)
